user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
**Draft Response:**

Hi [Customer's Name],

I'm truly sorry you're feeling this frustrated — I can see how upsetting this has been for you. That's the last thing we want any of our customers to experience.

I'd like to understand exactly what's happened so I can help fix it. Could you share a bit more detail about the issue? I'm here and ready to work with you on a solution right away.

Thank you for reaching out. We value your feedback and want to make this right.

Best regards,  
Compass  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a support-related task and provided a professional, empathetic draft response as instructed.
